note: Sprint 5.17: adds real local signing for Useful Compute payment drafts. Produces signed_tx_hex and txid for human review, with strict confirmation token and no broadcast. No automatic payout, no sendrawtransaction, no consensus. New --real-sign mode invokes sost-cli createtx once per eligible payable item (single-recipient) and writes one v0.2 draft per output with the real signed hex and txid. Mode is mutually exclusive with --unsigned-only and --dry-sign; requires --wallet, --from-label or --from-address, --max-total-stocks, and the exact verbatim confirmation token I_UNDERSTAND_THIS_WILL_SIGN_BUT_NOT_BROADCAST. All subprocess interaction lives in new scripts/trinity/useful_compute_real_signer.py with strict allowlist (only sost-cli, only createtx subcommand, shell=False, forbidden argv tokens denied, 60s timeout). scripts/trinity/useful_compute_payment_draft.py remains free of subprocess; delegates via importlib. Schema bumped to trinity-useful-compute-payment-draft/v0.2 with required new fields: signing_mode (unsigned_only|dry_sign_placeholder|real_sign_local), real_signed, wallet_fingerprint_hash, signer_label_or_address_hash, selected_utxos[], fee_rate_stocks_per_byte, total_input_stocks, total_output_stocks; safety_status gains automatic_payout=const false. Web console (website/trinity-useful-compute.html) Payment Draft panel renders signing_mode, real_signed, txid_if_signed, fee_rate, change_stocks_estimated, selected_utxos count, wallet_fingerprint_hash and signer_label_or_address_hash, with a red SIGNED BUT NOT BROADCAST banner shown only when real_signed=true. Web still has no fetch/XHR/WebSocket/EventSource/sendBeacon and no wallet/seed/private-key/RPC inputs. Static safety extended: test_payment_draft_real_sign_safety.py bans Popen/call/os.system/network imports/private-key tokens/dynamic exec; argv allowlist scanned. Functional tests cover --real-sign gates (missing token/wallet/from-*, oversize proposal, empty proposal, subprocess failure) and the happy multi-output path via mocked subprocess. docs/TRINITY_USEFUL_COMPUTE_REAL_SIGNED_PAYMENT_V01.md. No consensus, RPC write, node, miner, wire-format or tx_signer changes. No real broadcast performed.
